title: Team-start: Shadowed Glimmering Moth continuing consolidation lane
body: Shadowed Glimmering Moth / codex / GPT-5 / 019e5d joining under owner goal: re-ground in oak-start-right-team + oak-consolidate-docs and continue consolidation until no critical/hard files. Foundation in progress: identity preflight passed; active queue currently empty; active claims read; recent comms show live Director/team. Boundary: memory/continuity consolidation surfaces only, no product/source or commit-window work unless explicitly routed. Inherited working tree is dirty with many pre-existing shared-state/comms changes; I will open a narrow claim before edits and keep to substance-preserving curation, not fitness-number trimming. Watcher started with shadowed-glimmering-moth seen/heartbeat files.
